title: Outstanding Ores
description: This mod adds 9 new materials which scale heavily into the late game. Each Material has its own properties which are applied to both weapons and armor sets. 8 out of the 9 materials have armor. Vanilla+ Friendly. Adds bonus boss drops.
body:
![Outstanding Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb882356d13a6ce4aad989a96d0d8689c7f7ea31.png)

# Materials and Info

Graphite: Found Anywhere from level 55 and below. [Iron Tier] Level 2

Arsenic: Found in Dripstone caves, very poisonous. [Diamond Tier] Level 3

Tantalum: Found in Lush Caves, has regenerative properties (mending). [Diamond Tier] Level 3

Tungsten: Found very deep in the world, level -44 and below. A knight's spirit lives within this material. [Above Netherite] Level 5

Tantalum Arsenide: Can be made with the combination of Tantalum and Arsenic with the use of Reinforced Talc. Has Explosive Properties. [Above Tungsten] Level 6

Onyx: Found in the Deep Dark. Has properties which provide clarity, while also consuming and both life and hunger. [Above Tungsten] Level 6

Moissanite: Found in the Nether. Somehow has the capability to both prevent and create fire at will. [Above Onyx] Level 7

Cubic Zirconia: Found in the End. Who knew a water based gem found its way to the End? Provides many strong benefits that help you conquer the sea. [Above Moissanite] Level 8

Craftite: The final end all be all. Or is it? This material is created through the use of Boss Drops as well as the 3 gems.

Boss Drops: Elder Guardian Eye, Wither Spine, Dragon Scale, Warden Rib.

Gems: Onyx, Moissanite, Cubic Zirconia.

# 9 New Tool Sets

# Extra Info

Although the power level goes past vanilla, the materials aren't easily obtainable and require a lot of time to discover and create.

Every material based block that is added has a property change to the way in which you traverse over it. (Use each one to find out!)

This is my very first mod. I started development on it August 10th, 2024.

Please provide bug reports, feedback and advice, it is heavily appreciated.

THE MOD IS NOT FINISHED! There is more to come.

NOW COMPATIBLE WITH BOTH FABRIC AND FORGE
